name: chart-bar-demo-axis
visual_summary: A customizable bar chart component for demonstrating axis features. It is ideal for illustrating data visualization techniques and can be used when requiring a clear representation of categorical data with varying magnitudes. Developers can leverage this component to build data-driven applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-demo-axis
Description: A customizable bar chart component for demonstrating axis features. It is ideal for illustrating data visualization techniques and can be used when requiring a clear representation of categorical data with varying magnitudes. Developers can leverage this component to build data-driven applications.
Style: compact, light, modern
Interactions: static, no hover, no click events
Tags: chart, bar, visualization, axis, demonstration

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
